_comment: VIB-4879 mainnet smoke (acceptance criterion 8). Second-chain confirmation of the chain-agnostic ALMANAK_MAX_GAS_COST_USD=25 cap. Forces an immediate WETH->USDC trade on Arbitrum so we prove the USD-cost cap path works cross-chain with a single env var (no per-chain config). RSI is computed on WETH; rsi_overbought=1 makes every reading 'overbought' => SELL base on first signal transition. Not a production config.
_rearm_comment: rsi_rearm_band=0: the 0/1 force-trade thresholds leave no neutral zone for the default hysteresis band; the latch alone gates re-fires here.
